data.name: Adventures Of Willy Dickhard
data.detailed_description:
Adventures of Willy Dickhard is a fully animated, old-school point-and-click adventure inspired by the golden era of the genre.

With simple, classic gameplay mechanics, players will explore a world filled with puzzles, humor, and over 50 unique female characters to meet and interact with. The game offers around 40 hours of content, featuring numerous optional locations, hidden secrets, and a rich collectible system for players who love to dig deeper.

Whether you're here for the laughs, the puzzles, or the (ahem) adventures, Willy’s journey is as absurd as it is unforgettable.

Story

Willy Dickhard is just an average guy, average job, average life, average wife... but with a truly above-average mustache.

One day, he discovers he has an unexpected talent: the irresistible ability to seduce super sexy women.

Determined to make the most of this newfound gift, Willy sets out on a wild quest to charm every stunning girl he meets.

His adventure takes him across the chaotic streets of Duck City, and far beyond.

data.short_description: Adventures of Willy Dickhard is a cheeky, fully animated point-and-click adventure packed with humor, puzzles, and steamy encounters. Join Willy as he flirts, solves, and seduces his way through Duck City and beyond!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2Ghz+
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Non-Dedicated (shared) video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard sound card - openAL compatible
  • 備註: SSD recommended
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2Ghz+
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Non-Dedicated (shared) video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard sound card - openAL compatible
  • 備註: SSD recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.15 or later
  • 處理器: 2 GHz (Dual Core) or better
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Non-Dedicated (shared) video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 30 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard sound card - openAL compatible
  • 備註: SSD recommended

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+ (or equivalent)
  • 處理器: 2 GHz (Dual Core) or better
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Non-Dedicated (shared) video card with at least 512MB Shared VRAM & openGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 30 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard sound card - openAL compatible
  • 備註: SSD recommended
